title: KERNlang/kern
summary: MCP review engine with 148 rules (taint tracking, OWASP LLM01, concept model) + universal IR compiler: .kern compiles to 13 targets including Next.js, Vue, Express, and FastAPI. AGPL-3.0.

title: zakusworo/pv-multi-agent
summary: Multi-Agent AI System for PV Solar Simulation with GUI and Cloud LLM Support

title: Neill-Erasmus/agentic-research-assistant
summary: Planner-driven multi-agent research assistant for local Ollama models with web retrieval, summarization, fact-check cues, and APA citations.

title: FranBarInstance/simple-html-editor
summary: Simplest and smallest WYSIWYG with AI Agent web content editor, entire document, body and head, no dependencies.

title: MichaelLod/byoky
summary: Open-source AI wallet — your keys never leave your device. 15 providers, 2 lines to integrate, cross-provider translation. Browser extension + iOS + Android.

title: Awfp1314/UE_ToolkitAI
summary: AI-powered desktop toolbox for Unreal Engine developers with multi-model LLM, Function Calling, and real-time UE editor communication

title: OpenCoworkAI/open-codesign
summary: Open-source AI design tool — prompt to interactive prototype, slide deck, PDF & marketing assets. Multi-model (Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, DeepSeek, Ollama), BYOK, local-first. The open counterpart to Claude Design.

title: skalesapp/skales
summary: Your local AI Desktop Agent for Windows, macOS & Linux. Agent Skills (SKILL.md), autonomous coding (Codework), multi-agent teams, desktop automation, 15+ AI providers, Desktop Buddy. No Docker, no terminal. Free.

title: pikpikcu/airecon
summary: AIRecon is an autonomous cybersecurity agent that combines a self-hosted Large Language Model (Ollama) with a Kali Linux Docker sandbox and a Textual TUI. It is designed to automate security assessments, penetration testing, and bug bounty reconnaissance — without any API keys or cloud dependency.

title: RikyZ90/ShibaClaw
summary: 🛡️ Self-hosted AI agent with 5-layer prompt injection protection. Multi-channel, parallel agents, MCP, Docker-ready, LLM-agnostic.

title: junehawk/BIKO-GenomeBoard
summary: Korean population-aware genomic variant interpretation pipeline — deterministic ACMG/AMP classification with curate-then-narrate AI Clinical Board. Offline, research-use-only.

title: sterlp/ai-automated-desk
summary: AI desk to handle and manage files like AI naming of files, OCR files, RAG chat with files.

title: augur-os/augur-os
summary: Local-first personal AI OS. 200+ composable skills. Any model. Plain text. Yours forever.

title: krahd/modelito
summary: Lightweight Python abstractions and connectors for LLMs (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Ollama)

title: nodetool-ai/nodetool
summary: Visual Builder for AI Workflows and Agents

title: nmdra/Assignment-Metadata-Extractor
summary: A lightweight, locally hosted LLM pipeline that extracts and normalizes unstructured student assignment text into a strict JSON schema using a fine-tuned SmolLM2-360M model served via Ollama.

title: kpeacocke/piclaw
summary: Ansible runbook for Raspberry Pi 5 + AI HAT+ 2 (Hailo-10H) — enforces a known-good state with Hailo runtime, local LLM via Hailo Ollama, and OpenClaw on every run.

title: ElnurIbrahimov/apprentice-agent
summary: AURA — Adaptive Universal Reasoning Agent. Personal AI OS with persistent memory, MCTS reasoning, knowledge graph, 82 tools, on-device AI, and multi-surface presence (CLI, Web, Extension, Telegram). Self-hosted, self-improving.

title: Wewoc/Garmin_Local_Archive
summary: Secure, local-first archive for Garmin Connect health data (HRV, sleep, activities). Private & offline. Structured for local analysis (Excel, HTML-Dashboard, Ollama, Open WebUI, AnythingLLM). Your data stays on your machine.

title: Noninflammatory-tunny848/advertising-skills
summary: Build AI agent skills for paid media, direct-response copy, funnel design, and ad testing that improve conversion and scale campaigns
